events.event_name: No AI capability event assigned to Wave 6 epistemic calibration
events.event_description: This registry records that the anx_us_2026w06_epistemic packet is a non-event psychometric calibration wave for epistemic_trust_anxiety. It is intentionally not anchored to a frontier model release, capability demonstration, misinformation incident, deepfake incident, policy action, public-health information event, legal-evidence controversy, platform-labeling change, infrastructure access change, or other time-localized AI event. The registry is locked so Wave 6 responses cannot later be retrofitted into an event-study exposure design after outcome inspection.
